name: revit_create_direct_shape_from_face
description: Creates a Generic Model DirectShape from a picked face with sketch-plane reuse, per-triangle model lines, and geometry-instance transform stack resolution for nested families.

face_reference.description: Stable representation of the face to convert (interactive pick when omitted)

draw_model_lines.description: When true, draw model-line loops for each triangle (always true in the current command)

notes: Requires interactive face pick; also creates model lines and reuses sketch planes named '<not associated>'.
